source_title: DJI Mini 5 Pro | 3D Photogrammetry Tutorial For Beginners (Step-by-Step Guide)

concepts.name: Photogrammetry
concepts.definition: The science and technology of obtaining reliable information about physical objects and the environment through the process of recording, measuring, and interpreting photographic images.

concepts.name: Sparse Point Cloud
concepts.definition: A preliminary 3D representation formed by matching common points between overlapping photos, used as a preview before full reconstruction.

concepts.name: Overlap Strategy
concepts.definition: The technique of ensuring each photo shares a high percentage of visual data with neighboring photos to allow software to stitch them into a 3D model.

concepts.name: Bounding Box
concepts.definition: A 3D boundary that defines the specific spatial volume to be processed; anything outside this box is ignored during high-quality reconstruction.

procedures.name: Capturing Images with DJI Mini 5 Pro

steps.action: Set camera to 'Timed Shot' with a 5-second interval.
steps.explanation: The 50MP high-resolution files require time to process and write to the SD card.
steps.gotcha: The 5-second limit is a hardware constraint for 50MP shots; you must fly slowly to compensate.

steps.action: Fly 2-3 orbits around the subject at approximately 2 mph.
steps.explanation: Slow, steady movement ensures strong image overlap for accurate reconstruction.
steps.gotcha: Maintain consistency; use cruise control or very smooth manual stick movements.

steps.action: Set White Balance to 'Cloudy' or 'Sunny' and avoid ND filters.
steps.explanation: Consistent white balance prevents color flickering; avoiding ND filters prevents motion blur.
steps.gotcha: Do not use Auto White Balance as it may shift between frames.

steps.action: Capture additional detail of the facade (frontage).
steps.explanation: Closer, focused shots of the facade increase the final model's texture quality and detail.

steps.action: Import images using the 'Folder' option in the Workflow tab.
steps.explanation: Batch importing from a single directory is the most efficient way to load the dataset.
Analyzes images to create the sparse point cloud preview.
steps.gotcha: Processing time scales with the number of photos; be patient with large datasets.

steps.action: Adjust the Bounding Box using mouse controls.
steps.explanation: Focuses processing power only on the intended subject, saving time.
steps.gotcha: Ensure no parts of the subject are clipped outside the box or they will be missing in the final model.

gotchas.context: Using ND filters or flying too fast in low light.
gotchas.solution: Remove ND filters and fly at a very slow speed (approx. 2 mph).

gotchas.description: 5-second interval limitation on DJI Mini 5 Pro.
gotchas.solution: Fly the drone slower to ensure enough photos are taken for adequate overlap despite the long interval.

gotchas.context: Using Auto White Balance or Auto Exposure during flight.
gotchas.solution: Lock white balance to a manual preset (Sunny/Cloudy) and use manual camera mode if possible.
